required_skills: Middleware and Enterprise Service Bus Design
Database Design and ORM-Based Data Access
Technical Documentation and API Specification Writing
responsibilities: Develop, configure, and maintain enterprise application systems that integrate across internal platforms, third-party SaaS tools, and external partner APIs
Design and implement middleware integration layers using Apache Camel or MuleSoft to orchestrate data flows between heterogeneous enterprise applications
Build and maintain RESTful and SOAP API integrations with detailed error handling, retry logic, and schema validation to ensure reliable cross-system data exchange
Configure application authentication and authorization using OAuth 2.0, SAML, and SSO providers such as Okta to enforce enterprise identity governance
Instrument applications with APM tooling including New Relic and Splunk to capture transaction traces, error rates, and performance baselines for SLA adherence
Manage application configuration across development, staging, and production environments using environment variable management and secrets injection best practices
Collaborate with business analysts and stakeholders to translate functional requirements into technical application designs with clearly defined data contracts and integration schemas
Customize and extend ERP and CRM platforms by developing plugins, workflows, and data transformation scripts that automate business process execution
Write comprehensive API specifications using OpenAPI and Swagger to enable self-service integration by partner teams and external developers
Lead application migration and modernization efforts by refactoring legacy monolithic systems into modular, maintainable service-oriented components with minimal business disruption
